title: OrCAD Capture TCL API - Design Access
content:
# Design Access API

## GetActiveDesign
Returns the active design object.
```tcl
set design [GetActiveDesign]
```

## GetDesignName design
Returns the name of the design.
```tcl
set name [GetDesignName $design]
```

## GetDesignFileName design
Returns the full file path of the design file (.dsn).

## GetPages design
Returns a list of all schematic page objects in the design.

## GetName object
Returns the name of a page, net, or other named object.

## GetPageTitle page
Returns the title block text of a schematic page.

title: OrCAD Capture TCL API - Component Access
content:
# Component Access API

## GetPartInsts page
Returns all part instances on a schematic page.
```tcl
set parts [GetPartInsts $page]
```

## GetPropValue part propertyName
Returns the value of a property on a part instance.
Common properties: Reference, Value, PCB Footprint, Part Name, Part Number, Source Library
```tcl
set refdes [GetPropValue $part "Reference"]
set value [GetPropValue $part "Value"]
set fp [GetPropValue $part "PCB Footprint"]
```

## SetPropValue part propertyName value
Sets a property value on a part instance.
```tcl
SetPropValue $part "Value" "10K"
```

## GetPins part
Returns all pin objects of a part instance.

## GetPinNumber pin
Returns the pin number string.

## GetPinName pin
Returns the pin name string.

## GetPinType pin
Returns the electrical type (INPUT, OUTPUT, BIDIRECTIONAL, PASSIVE, POWER, etc.).

## GetPinNet pin
Returns the net name connected to the pin.

title: OrCAD Capture TCL API - Net Access
content:
# Net Access API

## GetFlatNets design
Returns all flat (non-hierarchical) nets in the design.
```tcl
set nets [GetFlatNets $design]
```

## GetNetName net
Returns the name of a net.

## GetNetPins net
Returns all pin objects connected to a net.

## GetPinRefDes pin
Returns the reference designator of the component owning the pin.

## GetPowerPins page
Returns all power pin objects on a page.

title: OrCAD Capture TCL API - Design Modification
content:
# Design Modification API

## AddPart page libraryPath partName refdes x y
Adds a new part instance to a schematic page.
```tcl
AddPart $page "C:/lib/passives.olb" "RES" "R1" 100 200
```

## DeletePart part
Deletes a part instance from the design.

## AddWire page x1 y1 x2 y2
Draws a wire between two points on a page.

## AddNetAlias page netName x y
Places a net alias (label) at a position.

## SaveDesign design
Saves the current design.
```tcl
SaveDesign $design
```
